examples: In the past, he fell in love with a red rose that was beautiful but vainglorious (Ťá™ŤīüÁöĄ) .
Make no vainglorious boasts, I beg you.
The fabulous tombs of the Recoleta Cemetery stand as vainglorious monuments, in death, to earthly success and ambition.
The projects that private marketers don't touch are almost always by definition vainglorious undertakings that do nothing to enhance economic growth.
